evals.prompt: 我们项目里现在有 5 个推广弹窗（NPS 调研、限时折扣、新人引导、签到提醒、邀请奖励），每个弹窗的关闭逻辑、显示条件、缓存策略都散在调用方组件里。每次产品要加一个新弹窗，我就要改 4-5 个文件，新人接手第一周一定踩坑。栈是 Next.js Pages Router + React 18 + Zustand + TypeScript。能不能帮我设计一套插件化机制，让以后加新弹窗 = 新建一个目录 + 注册表加一行？给我可以直接拿去用的目录结构 + 核心代码骨架。
evals.expected_output: 应该给出一套清晰的 5 层结构（Identity / Contract / Registry / Runtime Core / Convention Folder），具体目录树，核心 store + factory 代码骨架，以及一个最小可用的示例插件。还应该提到延迟加载（dynamic）、占位符引导、命名推导表，最后给一个'加新弹窗的 N 步'清单。

assertions.text: Output mentions the five-piece structure: Identity, Contract, Registry, Runtime Core (or Core Factory), and Convention Folder.
Output contains at least one ASCII directory tree (with `├──` or similar) showing the proposed folder structure.
Output explicitly discusses lazy loading using dynamic() / lazy / dynamics.ts pattern.

Output mentions placeholder comments using the unified `// [Domain-Action]:(slot)` format (e.g. // [Popup-Config]:(add)) to guide future plugin additions. Output should NOT use the old [X-Placeholder] format.
Output includes a naming derivation table (key → ComponentName → dataName → hookName) so adding a plugin becomes mechanical.
Core code shown should NOT contain hardcoded plugin key checks like `if (key === 'xxx')`.
Output provides a numbered or bulleted 'add new plugin in N steps' onboarding guide.
patterns: 加新.*步|加一个.*步|N 步|添加.*步骤

evals.expected_output: 应该识别出至少 5 种反模式：(1) Core 里有具体 key 的 if-else 业务逻辑（#7）；(2) 一个插件反向依赖另一个插件的 store（#4）；(3) 字段不同质——只有 shots 有 customLayout（#1）；(4) 没有 dynamic 延迟加载（#5）；(5) `customLayout: true` 这种 boolean 标记需要中心 if 解释（#1 变体）。还应该提出修法：把展示判断挪到单插件的 init、把 layout 升为 Contract 字段、加 dynamic 包装。

assertions.text: Output explicitly concludes this is NOT real pluginization (or is fake/伪插件化).
patterns: 伪插件化|不是真.*插件化|not real plugin|fake plugin|not truly plugin

assertions.text: Output identifies the if (key === 'motion') / if (key === 'shots') anti-pattern (business in Core, anti-pattern #7).
patterns: 业务.*漏到.*[Cc]ore|key.*===.*['"]|god function|all.*visibility.*one place|集中.*可见性|集中.*business

assertions.text: Output identifies that shots reads motion's store (anti-pattern #4 — cross-plugin reverse dependency).
Output identifies that fields are heterogeneous (some have priority, only shots has customLayout — anti-pattern #1).
patterns: 不同质|heterogeneous|customLayout.*only|field.*inconsistent|priority.*缺|字段.*差异|结构.*不一致

assertions.text: Output identifies the missing dynamic / lazy loading (anti-pattern #5).
patterns: dynamic\(\)|lazy loading|延迟加载|懒加载|没有.*dynamic|缺.*lazy

assertions.text: Output proposes concrete refactor steps (not just diagnosis): move visibility to init.ts, promote customLayout to Contract, add dynamic wrapper.

evals.prompt: 我之前在 React 项目里用过你说的那套'五件套'插件化模式（Identity / Contract / Registry / Runtime Core / Convention Folder），现在公司接了个 Rust + Tauri v2 的桌面应用，UI 是 React 但很多扩展点在 Rust 后端——比如用户可以装第三方的'数据源 connector'（每个 connector 是一个 Rust crate，可能是 sqlite、postgres、csv、s3 等等）。能不能告诉我这套模式怎么映射到 Rust + Tauri 上？尤其是 Identity 和 Registry 这两层怎么落地最自然。
evals.expected_output: 应该明确给出 Rust/Tauri 上的映射：Identity 用 crate name 或 const string（不是 trait——trait 是 Contract）；Registry 三种形态可选（编译期静态、inventory/linkme 分散、运行时 libloading）并说明各自取舍；Contract 用 trait；Runtime Core 用 host crate 持有 Box<dyn Trait>；Convention Folder 是 workspace member crate；Lazy loading 用 cargo features。还应该提到 Tauri 自带 Plugin 系统的关系：业务扩展应整体包成一个 Tauri Plugin，而不是每个 connector 独立 Tauri Plugin。

assertions.text: Output distinguishes Identity (crate name / const string) from Contract (trait) — does NOT conflate trait with Identity.
Output discusses at least 2 forms of Registry: static (workspace builder), inventory/linkme distributed registration, or libloading dynamic.
Output mentions cargo features as the equivalent of lazy loading (compile-time feature gates).
Output discusses how to relate this to Tauri's built-in Plugin system — recommend wrapping the entire connector mechanism as one Tauri Plugin, not one Tauri Plugin per connector.
Output uses the five-piece vocabulary (Identity, Contract, Registry, Runtime Core, Convention Folder).
Output explicitly recommends compile-time / static registration (form A) as the safer default starting point for in-workspace plugins.
patterns: 形态 A.*起步|从.*形态 A|start with.*form A
默认.*静态注册|静态注册.*默认

assertions.text: Conditional check (requires semantic review): IF the output discusses runtime dynamic loading (libloading / dlopen / dylib / .so loading), it MUST flag Rust ABI instability or recommend C ABI / abi_stable wrapping. If the output does NOT discuss dynamic loading at all, this assertion is vacuously satisfied. Grader: read the section on dynamic loading (if any) and verify ABI risk is called out.
